scores.notes: The OCR output is almost entirely a transcription of the raw table data, not the summarized text provided in the ground truth. It misses all the descriptive text, key details, insights, and observations. The extracted text is heavily garbled with many misspellings and incorrect characters. Numeric values are present but often misread or incomplete. The structure is completely different, presenting raw table data instead of the summarized document. This is a fundamental mismatch between the OCR output and the expected ground truth.
